items.title: CVE-2023-27351
items.summary: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class.
items.executive_summary: Regulation: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class.
recommended_actions: Track completion and residual risk in governance forums.
items.board_impact: Requires executive review for resilience, compliance, and operating risk impact.
ciso_action_items: Assign owners and timelines for mitigations.
Brief executive stakeholders on residual risk.
